notes: Critical recovery must not depend on a compromised deploy or runtime identity.
Use break-glass human identities (IAP + org admin) or backup@ for restore paths only.
Never paste secret values into this repository or drill tickets.

allowedActions: staging import (human-executed gcloud with backup@ impersonation)

rules: If github-deploy is suspected compromised, revoke WIF binding — do not use github-deploy for recovery.
Publication rollback uses publication operator path with publication kill switch engaged; not api-internal if that SA is tainted.
Queue pause/resume uses human gcloud with platform-admin — not worker runtime SAs.
Secret rotation uses Secret Manager + 1Password; never commit replacement values.
